Negative pressure wound therapy using a disposable device (dNPWT) that 
is an integrated system comprised of a non-manual vacuum pump, a 
receptacle for collecting exudate, and dressings for the purposes of wound 
therapy (in lieu of a conventional NPWT DME system), is also excluded 
from the 30-day period payment rate, but must be billed by the home 
health agency (HHA) while a patient is under a home health plan of care
